case_title: 365 FULTON, L.P. VS. ANNETTE BROWN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF LOST OR OTHERWISE UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NOT AT ISSUE $470.00 COSTS, $641.96 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,111.96, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $14.59. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $470.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. SERVED MAY-22-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
DECLARATION OF UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
DECLARATION OF CHRISTINA SERRANO IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 365 FULTON STREET #420, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, CA 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT ( UNLAWFUL DETAINER- CCP 585 (D) ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 365 FULTON, L.P.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, ANNETTE
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON NOV-04-2025.
